MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Philip Kiely is present. Attorney Joseph A. Sacramento appearing for the plaintiff. Represented by Linde Liu.

Defendant Pamela Clark is present.
Attorney John R. Weinstein representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled and settlement agreement was filed. The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
